name: rename-to-md
description: Batch-rename every non-directory file in the current directory by appending the .md extension. See #assets/payloads/TEMPLATES/rename-to-md.
outputs: Renames each file to add a .md suffix

behavior.scan_mode: Iterates over all entries matched by * in the current directory
behavior.rename_rule: Moves file to the same name plus .md
behavior.overwrite_behavior: Uses mv and therefore follows the shell/OS rename semantics
behavior.safety: Modifies filenames in place; no content changes

notes: The script is a template for bulk rename workflows
Because it uses * directly, it only targets the current directory
